headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: May 11, 2026**
article:
The Washington Nationals fell short in Miami, losing 5-2 to the Marlins. Heriberto Hernández led the Nationals' offense with 2 hits and 2 RBIs. Andrew Nardi pitched a strong 0.2 innings in relief, striking out 2 batters without allowing a run.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, including Addison Barger of the Toronto Blue Jays, who has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to right elbow inflammation. Other injured players include Eli White of the Atlanta Braves, Justin Verlander of the Detroit Tigers, Kerry Carpenter of the Detroit Tigers, Edwin Díaz of the Los Angeles Dodgers, Brock Stewart of the Los Angeles Dodgers, Logan Webb of the San Francisco Giants, and Brandon Lockridge of the Milwaukee Brewers.

The San Francisco Giants made a move to bolster their pitching staff, acquiring left-handed pitcher Matt Wilkinson from the Cleveland Guardians in exchange for catcher Patrick Bailey. The Baltimore Orioles also made a trade, acquiring RHP Enyel Garcia and RHP Maicol Lauriano from the Philadelphia Phillies for cash.

top_news.title: **Nationals Fall Short in Miami**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals suffered a 5-2 loss to the Miami Marlins, with Heriberto Hernández leading the Nationals' offense with 2 hits and 2 RBIs. Andrew Nardi pitched a strong 0.2 innings in relief, striking out 2 batters without allowing a run.

top_news.title: **Orioles Take Down Athletics 2-1**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles secured a narrow victory over the Athletics with a final score of 2-1. Chris Bassitt earned the win for the Orioles, pitching 6.0 innings with 6 strikeouts and 1 earned run.

top_news.title: **Rays Take Down Red Sox 4-1**
top_news.summary: The Tampa Bay Rays secured a 4-1 victory over the Boston Red Sox, with Nick Martinez earning the win. Bryan Baker earned the save in the win.

top_news.title: **Rockies Fall to Phillies in Shutout**
top_news.summary: The Colorado Rockies suffered a 6-0 loss to the Philadelphia Phillies, marking a disappointing end to the game. Kyle Schwarber led the Phillies' offense with three hits, including two home runs.

top_news.title: **Blue Jays' Barger Lands on Injured List**
top_news.summary: Toronto Blue Jays right fielder Addison Barger has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to right elbow inflammation, effective retroactive to May 10, 2026.

top_news.title: **Giants Acquire LHP Matt Wilkinson in Trade**
top_news.summary: The San Francisco Giants have made a move to bolster their pitching staff, acquiring left-handed pitcher Matt Wilkinson from the Cleveland Guardians in exchange for catcher Patrick Bailey.
